mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, host, port, protocol, username, password, region, status, bound_account_id, bound_at, last_sample_check_at, detected_country_code, outbound_ip, detected_location, detected_isp, detected_latitude, detected_longitude, check_fail_count, last_check_error, check_status, whatsapp_check_status, whatsapp_http_status, whatsapp_check_error, source, ownership, allocation_mode, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by, deleted_at

sql.if:
HAVING
COUNT(p.id) = 0
COUNT(p.id) > 0 AND COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0
COUNT(p.id) > 0 AND NOT ( COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 ) AND ((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0) / COUNT(p.id)) < 20
COUNT(p.id) > 0 AND NOT ( COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 ) AND NOT (((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0) / COUNT(p.id)) < 20) AND ((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0) / COUNT(p.id)) > 50
COUNT(p.id) > 0 AND NOT ( ( COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 ) OR ((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0) / COUNT(p.id)) < 20 OR ((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0) / COUNT(p.id)) > 50 )
1 = 1

mapper.sql:
SELECT c.name_zh AS region, COUNT(p.id) AS total_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS in_use_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS idle_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unavailable_ip_count, c.last_ip_sample_check_at AS last_sample_check_at FROM country c LEFT JOIN ip_proxy p ON TRIM(p.region) = c.name_zh AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.region) != '' AND p.protocol = #{q.protocol} AND p.allocation_mode = #{q.allocationMode} AND p.source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.source}, '%') WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.is_enabled = 1 AND c.is_ip_supported = 1
AND ( c.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR c.iso2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR p.host LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR p.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR p.source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR CONCAT(p.host, ':', p.port) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY c.id, c.name_zh, c.last_ip_sample_check_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ip_proxy
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT ip_stats.total_ip_count, ip_stats.in_use_ip_count, ip_stats.idle_ip_count, ip_stats.unavailable_ip_count, country_stats.covered_region_count, country_stats.supported_country_count, country_stats.supported_country_count - country_stats.covered_region_count AS no_ip_country_count FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_ip_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS in_use_ip_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS idle_ip_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS unavailable_ip_count FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ) ip_stats CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS supported_country_count, COUNT(DISTINCT p.region) AS covered_region_count FROM country c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(region) AS region FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(region) != '' ) p ON p.region = c.name_zh WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.is_enabled = 1 AND c.is_ip_supported = 1 ) country_stats

ORDER BY
in_use_ip_count idle_ip_count unavailable_ip_count
((idle_ip_count + in_use_ip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_ip_count, 0))
(unavailable_ip_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_ip_count, 0))
total_ip_count
ASC DESC , region ASC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT c.name_zh AS region, COUNT(p.id) AS total_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS available_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS in_use_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unavailable_ip_count FROM country c LEFT JOIN ip_proxy p ON TRIM(p.region) = c.name_zh AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.region) != '' WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.is_enabled = 1 AND c.is_ip_supported = 1 AND c.name_zh = #{region} GROUP BY c.id, c.name_zh LIMIT 1

SELECT id, host AS proxy_host, port AS proxy_port, CONCAT(host, ':', port) AS proxy_address, protocol, region, status, bound_account_id, source, allocation_mode, ownership, last_sample_check_at, check_fail_count AS fail_count FROM ip_proxy
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT region FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(region) AS region FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(region) != '' ) r ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.region = #{mixedRegion} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.region ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_proxy (host, port, protocol, username, password, region, status, detected_country_code, outbound_ip, detected_location, detected_isp, detected_latitude, detected_longitude, check_fail_count, last_check_error, check_status, whatsapp_check_status, whatsapp_http_status, whatsapp_check_error, source, ownership, allocation_mode, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{host}, #{port}, #{protocol}, #{username}, #{password}, #{region}, #{status}, #{detectedCountryCode}, #{outboundIp}, #{detectedLocation}, #{detectedIsp}, #{detectedLatitude}, #{detectedLongitude}, COALESCE(#{checkFailCount}, 0), #{lastCheckError}, #{checkStatus}, #{whatsappCheckStatus}, #{whatsappHttpStatus}, #{whatsappCheckError}, #{source}, #{ownership}, #{allocationMode}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ip_proxy WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

select.if: SELECT FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id IN #{id} ORDER BY id ASC

mapper.update: UPDATE ip_proxy SET status = CASE WHEN status = #{inUseStatus} THEN status ELSE #{entity.status} END, region = #{entity.region}, last_sample_check_at = #{entity.lastSampleCheckAt}, detected_country_code = #{entity.detectedCountryCode}, outbound_ip = #{entity.outboundIp}, detected_location = #{entity.detectedLocation}, detected_isp = #{entity.detectedIsp}, detected_latitude = #{entity.detectedLatitude}, detected_longitude = #{entity.detectedLongitude}, check_fail_count = #{entity.checkFailCount}, last_check_error = #{entity.lastCheckError}, check_status = #{entity.checkStatus}, whatsapp_check_status = #{entity.whatsappCheckStatus}, whatsapp_http_status = #{entity.whatsappHttpStatus}, whatsapp_check_error = #{entity.whatsappCheckError}, updated_at = #{entity.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{entity.id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

select.if: SELECT DISTINCT bound_account_id FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{usingStatus} AND bound_account_id IS NOT NULL AND id IN #{id}
